title: sticherus interjectus
intro: Sticherus interjectus, also known as the Spiny Club Fern or Sticherus fern, is a species of fern native to Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Sticherus interjectus include reducing oxidative stress, improving cardiovascular health, and potentially exerting antimicrobial and anticancer activities. Herbal preparations of Sticherus interjectus typically involve drying and processing the leaves, which can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules for consumption.
